title: Improving Factual Consistency in Summarization
body: Text summarization aims to compress a long docu-ment(s) into a short and fluent form that preserves salient information. State-of-the-art models, how-ever, are often not factually consistent with the input they are conditioned on (Maynez et al., 2020; Fabbri et al., 2022).

title: (PDF) Stress Testing Factual Consistency Metrics for...
body: Evaluating the factual consistency of abstractive text summarization remains a significant challenge, particularly for long documents, where conventional metrics struggle with input length limitations and long-range dependencies.
